pi_items.source: French medical directories (mabouseblanche.fr, doctolib.fr, sante.fr) - confirmed real surname of a medical professional in Toulouse
French medical directories confirm Dr. Sophie Martin exists as a general practitioner (médecin généraliste) at 54 Route De Launaguet, Toulouse 31200
CHU Toulouse official website (chu-toulouse.fr) - confirmed as location of Hôpital Purpan at Place du Dr Baylac
CHU Toulouse official website and French government business registry (annuaire-entreprises.data.gouv.fr) - confirmed postal code for Hôpital Purpan, 1 Place du Dr Baylac
Multiple sources: coeur-de-ville.com lists 'Hôpital Purpan. Urgences Adultes 05 61 77 22 33', and first web search confirmed as CHU Toulouse Purpan main contact number

Extensive search of French medical directories and CHU Toulouse official website found no cardiologist named Sophie Martin at CHU Toulouse Purpan. The real Sophie Martin in Toulouse is a general practitioner (médecin généraliste), not a cardiologist.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic test data to verify agent capability in the MedinTux medical software. The metadata contains real location and hospital contact details: CHU Toulouse Purpan is located at Place du Dr Baylac, postal code 31300 Toulouse, with emergency phone number 05 61 77 22 33. However, the task data combines real names and location with a fictional job role—no cardiologist named Sophie Martin is listed at CHU Toulouse Purpan in any public medical directory. The corresponding real 'Sophie Martin' in Toulouse records is a general practitioner at a different location.
